text:
/ci4 1 ダーカイム爆発の衝撃で
突出針が誤作動しちゃったみたいだね。
気をつけて進もう。

/ci4 1 The impact from the Falmorpher explosion
must have caused the spikes to malfunction.
We need to be careful as we go forward.

ダーカイム爆発の衝撃で
突出針が誤作動しちゃったみたいだね。
気をつけて進もう。

The impact from the Falmorpher explosion
must have caused the spikes to malfunction.
We need to be careful as we go forward.
